ksa_text: Knowledge of data processing and transformation principles, including data manipulation techniques, data mapping methods, format conversion, cleansing procedures, and the impact of transformation choices on analytical outcomes.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AB-K-010 (AB, Knowledge) maps to Bioinformatics Technician scope as strong fit. Composite score 0.4169 clears the strong fit threshold of 0.35. Top framework anchors: eu_ai_act=0.417, nist_ai_rmf=0.410, nice=0.401. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within bioinformatics analysis, genomic data processing, and life sciences analytics.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4169 for strong fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. Analytics-domain text signals confirmed. No internal contradictions identified.

Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. Composite 0.4169 with signal across eu_ai_act=0.417, nist_ai_rmf=0.410, nice=0.401 is consistent with documented ANL competency expectations at IC-to-senior-IC level. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from AB-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Bioinformatics Technician at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4169, domain AB, scope strong fit. High confidence.
